decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to quickly deploy artifacts onto the battlefield and use them to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. By using cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to generate mana and tokens, the deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives provides the deck with answers to opposing threats, while cards like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt can shut down specific strategies. The goal is to outpace the opponent and secure a quick victory through sheer aggression and resource management.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Amulet of Vigor to untap lands and generate extra mana in order to ramp up quickly and play powerful cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. By combining land tutoring cards like Tolaria West and Urza's Saga with land bounce lands like Simic Growth Chamber, the deck aims to assemble the pieces needed for a game-winning combo. Cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Cultivator Colossus provide additional utility and card advantage to help achieve the combo and overwhelm opponents.

The main idea of this deck is to use the combination of Basking Broodscale, Blade of the Bloodchief, and Glaring Fleshraker with support from cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful combo. The deck also includes tools like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to help find key pieces quickly while maintaining control with cards like Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern. Emrakul, the Promised End provides a powerful finisher, making this deck a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 gameplay.

The deck revolves around using powerful reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance to bring back key combo pieces such as Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard for a game-winning play. To protect the combo, the deck includes various counterspells like Force of Negation and disruption spells like Thoughtseize. The deck also leverages cards like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending for card advantage and recursion. By utilizing a combination of graveyard manipulation, powerful creatures, and protection spells, this deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and win the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards that allow for reanimation of powerful creatures from the graveyard, such as Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty. The deck focuses on setting up the graveyard with cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce. By efficiently reanimating creatures and controlling the game with removal spells like Fatal Push, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and quickly close out the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the combo of Broodscale Bloodchief and Glaring Fleshraker to generate significant value by sacrificing creatures. The deck also focuses on ramping into Emrakul, the Promised End through cards like Ancient Stirrings and Eldrazi Temple. Additionally, it includes disruption elements such as Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern to control the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to assemble the combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and disruptive plays.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine) to generate a large amount of mana. This mana is used to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Karn, the Great Creator, as well as control spells like Thought-Knot Seer and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon. The deck also utilizes cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Talisman of Resilience to further control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategies. Overall, the deck aims to overpower the opponent with its powerful threats and versatile control capabilities.

This deck focuses on utilizing Allosaurus Rider and Eldritch Evolution to quickly assemble the powerful Allosaurus Combo, allowing you to search for and play key creatures like Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant and Griselbrand. Consign to Memory and Summoner's Pact provide additional consistency and options for the combo, while cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer protect your key pieces. The deck also includes extra mana sources and card draw to ensure you can execute your game plan efficiently and overcome your opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting to bring out powerful creatures like Vengevine and Hollow One early in the game. The deck also utilizes cards like Scalding Tarn and Lightning Bolt for removal and disruption, while cards like Detective's Phoenix and Marauding Mako provide additional threats on the battlefield. By combining aggressive creatures with graveyard recursion and card draw, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, consistent pressure.

This deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate large amounts of mana, allowing for powerful plays with Eldrazi creatures and colorless spells. It includes disruptive elements such as Trinisphere, Chalice of the Void, and Ugin's Labyrinth to control the game and prevent opponents from executing their game plan effectively. Karn, the Great Creator serves as a versatile threat and toolbox for finding key artifacts, while Emrakul, the Promised End and other Eldrazi creatures provide massive threats that can quickly close out games. The deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through efficient removal and powerful late-game plays.

This deck focuses on aggressively filling the graveyard with cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting to quickly bring out powerful creatures such as Vengevine and Hollow One. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and efficient board presence, using cards like Lightning Bolt to clear the way for your creatures to attack. With a combination of discard effects and efficient threats, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful synergy between Broodscale Bloodchief and various support cards to generate a lethal combo that overwhelms the opponent. It utilizes cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Kozilek's Command to control the board while setting up the combo pieces. Emrakul, the Promised End and Blade of the Bloodchief serve as finishers to quickly end the game once the combo is assembled. The deck also includes disruption spells like Unholy Heat and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own combo pieces.

This deck aims to control the game by using a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage to outvalue the opponent. The key strategy involves disrupting the opponent's game plan and maintaining board control until it can stabilize and set up win conditions such as planeswalkers or powerful spells. The deck also utilizes a companion creature to provide additional value and flexibility in certain matchups. The goal is to outlast the opponent and grind them out with efficient removal and powerful card advantage engines.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Counterspells, along with removal like Fatal Push. The deck also utilizes card draw and filtering with Preordain and Subtlety to ensure consistency in drawing key cards. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog provide additional disruption and creatures like Murktide Regent can close out games quickly. The mana base includes a mix of lands to support the color requirements of the spells. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling a combo win condition by using cards like Thud, Plunge into Darkness, and Spoils of the Vault to either deal massive damage or find key pieces. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Inquisition of Kozilek to disrupt opponents' game plans. The creatures in the deck serve as additional threats and can help enable the combo. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's game plan and ensure it can consistently execute its strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize various spells and creatures to quickly assemble a powerful combo that can potentially win the game in one turn. By using cards like Spoils of the Vault, Thud, Plunge into Darkness, and Devourer of Destiny, the deck aims to generate a large amount of damage or resources in a short amount of time. Additionally, the inclusion of Chancellor of the Tangle and Cosmogoyf provides additional support and threats to pressure the opponent while setting up the combo.
